news.paragraph: Snowflake is approaching its Q1 earnings report, which serves as a significant upcoming catalyst for the stock. Analysts at Oppenheimer have expressed positive expectations, describing the anticipated results as solid. Options traders should weigh this upcoming earnings event when considering new positions.
headlines: Snowflake to Report 'Solid' Q1 Results, Oppenheimer Says
